headline: Oracle (ORCL) Launches AI Hotel Tools As Loews Goes Live On OPERA Cloud
summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) has launched OPERA Cloud Assistant, an AI-powered toolkit designed to automate hotel operations, guest engagement, and revenue management. The new assistant is available at no additional cost to existing OPERA Cloud customers. Loews Hotels has gone live with an advanced integration that uses Oracle OPERA Cloud as its data backbone, supporting more than 1,000,000 guest interactions each month. Oracle, trading at $188.33, is adding a fresh hospitality angle to its AI story...

headline: Uplynk and Oracle Deliver Hybrid Streaming Architecture on OCI
summary: WILMINGTON, Del., June 17, 2026--Uplynk today announced expanded support for Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI), enabling a unified hybrid deployment model for large-scale streaming workflows. Core video infrastructure including encoding, storage, and playout can run on OCI either on-premises or in the cloud, while Uplynk provides a centralized platform to orchestrate live, linear, and VOD streaming across environments.

content.title: Uplynk and Oracle Deliver Hybrid Streaming Architecture on OCI
content.summary: WILMINGTON, Del., June 17, 2026--Uplynk today announced expanded support for Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI), enabling a unified hybrid deployment model for large-scale streaming workflows. Core video infrastructure including encoding, storage, and playout can run on OCI either on-premises or in the cloud, while Uplynk provides a centralized platform to orchestrate live, linear, and VOD streaming across environments.

thumbnail.caption: Uplynk + Oracle Hybrid Streaming Architecture. OCI provides the infrastructure for ingest, transcoding, storage, and SmartPlay manifest generation, while Uplynk orchestrates live, linear, and VOD streaming with integrated SSAI and StreamOps for operational excellence.

headline: Lightpath Monetizes Digital Services and Powers AI-Driven Innovation with Oracle
summary: Lightpath is using Oracle Cloud Scale Billing to transform its business through faster service delivery, more agile monetization capabilities, and improved operational efficiency. With the solution, the company can now streamline complex billing processes for its diverse enterprise customers. This includes enabling concurrent support for multiple pricing and payment models, in any hierarchical structure, across large installations with millions of IoT devices. headline: Oracle Stock's High Stakes Gamble
summary: If you hold Oracle (ORCL) stock, you’ve felt the turbulence. Despite a recent bounce, the shares are down over the last 12 months and sit well below their peak, a sign the market is wrestling with a profound shift in the company’s story. The options market is pricing in elevated uncertainty, with implied volatility in the 67th percentile of its annual range. This isn't about a legacy business in decline; it's about the significant risks of a company going all-in on a new one.

content.title: Oracle Stock's High Stakes Gamble
content.summary: If you hold Oracle (ORCL) stock, you’ve felt the turbulence. Despite a recent bounce, the shares are down over the last 12 months and sit well below their peak, a sign the market is wrestling with a profound shift in the company’s story. The options market is pricing in elevated uncertainty, with implied volatility in the 67th percentile of its annual range. This isn't about a legacy business in decline; it's about the significant risks of a company going all-in on a new one.
